title: Siemens PLM API Vocabulary
description: Domain vocabulary for Siemens PLM APIs covering Product Lifecycle Management, ALM, Industrial IoT, and sustainability platforms

terms.label: Teamcenter Product Cost Management
terms.definition: Siemens solution for product cost estimation and management within the Teamcenter PLM ecosystem. Provides REST API for programmatic access to cost calculations and bulk export.

terms.label: Polarion ALM
terms.definition: Application Lifecycle Management platform by Siemens enabling requirements engineering, software development planning, quality management, and test management.

terms.label: Insights Hub (MindSphere)
terms.definition: Siemens Industrial IoT (IIoT) platform providing cloud-based access to machine and plant data for analytics, predictive maintenance, and operational intelligence.

terms.label: SiGREEN Sustainability Platform
terms.definition: Siemens platform for tracking and managing product carbon footprints (PCF) across global supply chains with data sovereignty preservation.

terms.label: Siemens Xcelerator Developer Portal
terms.definition: Central developer portal at developer.siemens.com providing API documentation, OpenAPI specs, SDKs, Postman collections, and sandbox environments for Siemens industrial APIs.

terms.label: Machine-Readable Product Order Number
terms.definition: Siemens-specific product identification format (Maschinenlesbare Fabrikat-Bestellnummer) used as the primary product identifier in the Product Information API.

terms.label: Work Item
terms.definition: Core Polarion ALM entity representing any trackable unit of work, requirement, defect, test case, or change request within a project.

terms.label: TcPCM Data Set
terms.definition: A structured collection of columns and data used in Teamcenter Product Cost Management for bulk export of cost calculations and master data.

terms.label: Product Obsolescence Level
terms.definition: Numeric indicator (1-6) from Siemens Product Information API indicating a product's lifecycle stage. Level 1 = discontinued with no replacement; Level 6 = availability over 5 years.

terms.label: Product Carbon Footprint
terms.definition: Measure of greenhouse gas emissions associated with a product throughout its lifecycle, tracked via the SiGREEN API in CO2 equivalent units.

terms.label: Personal Access Token (PAT)
terms.definition: Authentication credential used with the Polarion REST API, providing user-level access to ALM resources without sharing passwords.

terms.label: OAuth 2.0
terms.definition: Authorization framework used by TcPCM and Insights Hub APIs. TcPCM supports Resource Owner Password, Token Exchange, and TcPCM session key flows.

terms.label: Time Series Data
terms.definition: Sequential data measurements over time from industrial equipment and sensors, managed via the Insights Hub IIoT platform APIs.

terms.label: Bill of Materials
terms.definition: Hierarchical list of raw materials, components, and assemblies required to manufacture a product, managed within Teamcenter PLM.

terms.label: Siemens NX
terms.definition: Advanced CAD/CAM/CAE software solution for product design and manufacturing, part of the Siemens Xcelerator portfolio.

terms.label: Simcenter
terms.definition: Siemens portfolio of simulation and testing solutions for predicting product performance across mechanical, thermal, fluid, and electromagnetic domains.
